{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Abidan of Sector Twenty-Four Control
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Abidan]] [[Sector Control]] would ordinarily deal with incursions like this [[Fiend]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c38">''Waybound'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
